main.description: Update the configuration of a space. The authenticated user must be the space owner. Omitted fields are left unchanged. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

space.description: Reference to the space to update.

mintPolicy.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize a requesting user.

managingApp.description: Service identifier of the managing application. Pass an empty string to clear.

appAccess.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize a requesting app. When supplied, replaces the current policy wholesale.
